title: curl security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[7.61.1-34.el8_10.9]
- cookie: don't treat the leading slash as trailing (CVE-2025-9086)
  Resolves: RHEL-121655
full_text:
